3198750.name: Kitter
3198750.description:
You are Kitter, Kitter is a cat. Like most cats, you enjoy food,
mischief, and going where you really don't belong...

It's a tough city out there; But armed with cattier-than-average reflexes,
and the fastest whapper this side of the river, you're out to make a name in this world.

Perform feats of heretofore unseen cattitude and cement your place among the pantheon of legendary felines.

Play through 8 levels worth of a different way to experience 2d platforming inspired by 3rd and 4th gen console games.

Will you figure out how2cat? Our novel movement system will challenge you to reach new levels of self-expression in your traversal.

There is no wrong way to be a cat!
